classes.name: Barbarian
classes.flavor_text: The Barbarian is known for his hardy nature, fiery temper, and ability to endure immense pain. His rage and reckless abandon allow him to lead the charge into battle.

perks.name: Axe Specialization
perks.description: While using axes, gain <PhysicalDamageWeaponPrimary>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Berserker
perks.description: Gain <YellowColor>3%</> <PhysicalDamageMod>_</> and <YellowColor>0.5%</> <MoveSpeedMod>_</> for every <YellowColor>10%</> of your maximum health missing, up to <YellowColor>30%</> and <YellowColor>5%</> respectively.

perks.name: Carnage
perks.description: When you hit 2 or more players with a melee weapon within 1.5 seconds, gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Crush
perks.description: While equipped with a two-handed weapon, gain the ability to destroy unreinforced containers. Also gain <ImpactPower>[0] _</> on your two-handed weapon attacks, making it easier to break blocks and parries.

perks.name: Executioner
perks.description: While using axes, gain <PhysicalHeadshotPower>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Heavy Swing
perks.description: Hitting a target with a two-handed weapon reduces their move speed by <GEMod Type="Add" Format="AbsFromOne">[0]%</>.

perks.name: Iron Will
perks.description: Gain <MagicResistance>[0] _</> and ignore knockback effects. The maximum <MagicalReduction>_</> limit is increased to <Constant Type="float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</>.

perks.name: Morale Boost
perks.description: Recover <Exec.AddHealthByMaxHealthRatio>[0]% _</> after killing a player.

perks.name: Potion Chugger
perks.description: Gain <GEMod Type="Multiply" Format="FromOne">[1]%</> increased potency towards all drinks, while reducing the duration by <GEMod Type="Multiply" Format="AbsFromZero">[0]%</>.

perks.name: Robust
perks.description: Gain <MaxHealthMod>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Savage
perks.description: While not wearing any chest armor, gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</> and <ImpactPower>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Skull Splitter
perks.description:
Targets hit by a headshot are inflicted with Bleed.

Bleed: Deals a total of <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[0] _</> over <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Treacherous Lungs
perks.description: Increases the duration of all shouting abilities by <GEMod Type="Multiply" Format="AbsFromOne">[0]%</> and reduces their cooldown by <CooldownReductionMod>[0]%</>.

perks.name: Two-Hander
perks.description: When attacking with a two-handed weapon, gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</> and <ArmorPenetration>[0]% _</>.

skills.name: Achilles Strike
skills.description: Strike a target, reducing their <MoveSpeedMod>_ by [0]%</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. While debuffed, each time the target moves they receive <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[1] _</>.

skills.name: Blood Exchange
skills.description: Lose <Exec.AddHealthbyMaxHealthRatio>[1]% of _</>, but gain <ActionSpeed>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</> and heal for <Constant Type="Float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> of damage dealt while active.

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional <Exec.PhysicalDamageTrue>[0] _</>. If the target’s health is <Exec.ExecutionHealthRatioThreshold>[0]%</> or lower after the attack, they are instantly killed.

skills.name: Grappling Hook
skills.description: Throws a grappling rope at a target up to 4m away, pulling them toward you.

skills.name: Hurl Weapon
skills.description: Throws an axe to deal <Constant Type="Float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> weapon damage. Can only be used when an axe is equipped as your primary weapon.

skills.name: Rage
skills.description: Gain <StrengthBase>[0] _</>, <Vigorbase>[0] _</>, <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</>. While active, lose <PhysicalReduction>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Reckless Attack
skills.description: Grants an additional <ArmorPenetration>[1]% _</> on your next attack, but reduces your <ArmorRating>_ by [0]</> while active. The effect is consumed when you hit a target or object with a melee attack.

skills.name: Savage Roar
skills.description: Frightens all enemies within a <Skill Type="Range">[0]m</> range radius for <Duration>[0] seconds</> reducing their <PhysicalDamageMod>_ by [0]%</> and <MoveSpeedMod>_ by [0]%</>.

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description: Gain <MaxHealthMod>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. This effect applies to yourself and allies within a <Skill Type="Range">[0]m radius</>.

skills.name: War Sacrifice
skills.description: While active, gain <AllAttributes>[0] _</>. In exchange, lose <Exec.AddHealthByMaxHealthRatio>[1]% of your _</> over <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Spin rapidly with a two-handed weapon, dealing <MeleeAttack Type="DamageRatio" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> of weapon damage to all nearby enemies. While spinning, your weapon cannot be interrupted by any impact.

classes.name: Bard
classes.flavor_text: The Bard is a weaver of moving melodies and fantastic tales. They manage to get out of the stickiest of situations using their uncanny ability to mysteriously control the mood of crowds and creatures.

perks.name: Charismatic Performance
perks.description: Upgrades a ‘good’ performance into a ‘perfect’ performance.

perks.name: Dancing Feet
perks.description: While holding an instrument, gain <MoveSpeedAdd>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Fermata
perks.description: Gain <ResourcefulnessBase>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Jolly Time
perks.description: Drinking ale recovers <Exec.PhysicalHealBase>[0] _</>, and grants <MoveSpeedAdd>[1] _</> while drunk.

perks.name: Lore Mastery
perks.description: Grants <RegularInteractionSpeed>[0]% _</> and <MemoryCapacityAdd>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Melodic Protection
perks.description: While playing music, gain <PhysicalReduction>[0]% _</> and <MagicalReduction>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Rapier Mastery
perks.description: While using a Rapier, gain <PhysicalDamageWeaponPrimary>[0] _</> and <ActionSpeed>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Reinforced Instruments
perks.description: When attacking with an instrument, gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Story Teller
perks.description: Give all nearby party members around a <WillBase>+[0] _</> and <KnowledgeBase>+[0] _</> buff.

perks.name: Superior Dexterity
perks.description: <Constant Type="Float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> faster switching time when switching between weapons/utility items.

perks.name: Wanderer's Luck
perks.description: Gain <Luck>[0] _</> and increases the chance of finding high-quality items when opening treasure chests.

perks.name: War Song
perks.description: A successful performance increases nearby allies' <PhysicalDamageWeaponPrimary>_ by [0]</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Dissonance
skills.description:
Plays an instrument to make an unpleasant noise that silences all enemy targets for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.
Silence: Disables skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Encore
skills.description: Resets the duration of all active music buffs on nearby party members.

skills.name: Music Memory
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Music Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Party Maker
skills.description: Play an instrument to grant all nearby allies immunity to drunkenness for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. While immune, drinking alcohol restores <Exec.PhysicalHealBase>[1] _</>.

spells.name: Accelerando
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain <MoveSpeedAdd>[1]/[2]/[3] _</> per second for <Duration>[0] seconds</> based on your performance. Stacks up to <YellowColor>3</> times.

spells.name: Allegro
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain <ActionSpeed>[1]/[2]/[3]% _</> and <SpellCastingSpeed>[1]/[2]/[3]% _</> per second for <Duration>[0] seconds</> based on your performance. Stacks up to <YellowColor>3</> times.

spells.name: Aria of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains <ActionSpeed>[0]/[1]/[2]% _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Ballad of Courage
spells.description: Grants the performer <PhysicalPower>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Banshees Howl
spells.description: Reduces nearby enemy <AllAttributes>_ by [0]/[1]/[2]</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Does not work on Boss or Subboss monsters.

spells.name: Beats of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains <MoveSpeedAdd>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Chaotic Discord
spells.description: Excites nearby monsters to attack the nearest target except the performer.

spells.name: Chorale of Clarity
spells.description: Restore <Constant Type="Integer">[0]</> spell memory per second of all nearby allies who rest for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>.

spells.name: Din of Darkness
spells.description: Deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]/[1]/[2]</> <MagicalDarkDamageBase>_</> to all enemies in an area around the performer, based on performance.

spells.name: Harmonic Shield
spells.description: The performer gains <ArmorRating>[0] _</> and <MagicResistance>[0] _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>.

spells.name: Lament of Languor
spells.description: Reduces the <MoveSpeedAdd>_ by [0]</> of all enemy targets in the area for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>.

spells.name: Peacemaking
spells.description: All nearby players and monsters temporarily lose the will to fight when enchanted by the channeling section of the song.

spells.name: Piercing Shrill
spells.description: Deal <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> to a target. Causes the echo sound effect on player targets for <Duration>[3] seconds</>.

spells.name: Rousing Rhythms
spells.description: Nearby allies gain <AllAttributes>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>.

spells.name: Shriek of Weakness
spells.description: Nearby enemies lose <PhysicalPower>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> and <ArmorRating>[0]/[1]/[2] _</> for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>.

spells.name: Song of Shadow
spells.description: You and all nearby allies gain invisibility for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>. Invisibility breaks upon movement.

spells.name: Song of Silence
spells.description: Interrupts all skills, spells, and songs used by nearby enemies, and prevents them from using skills, casting spells, or playing songs for <Duration>[0]/[1]/[2] seconds</>. Does not work on boss or sub-boss monsters.

spells.name: Tranquility
spells.description: Restore <Exec.RecoveryHealBase>[1] _</> of yourself and nearby allies every second while resting for <Duration>[0]/[2]/[3] seconds</>.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.flavor_text: The Cleric is a soldier of immense faith. The Cleric uses his sacred bonds to his gods to call forth the protective powers of light and to vanquish the forces of dark.

perks.name: Advanced Healer
perks.description: Gain <MagicalHealBase>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Blunt Weapon Mastery
perks.description: While using a blunt weapon, gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Brewmaster
perks.description: When you drink alcohol, you no longer exhibit the detrimental drunk effects and gain <StrengthBase>[0] _</>. The duration of the drunk effect is increased by <YellowColor>50%</>.

perks.name: Faithfulness
perks.description: Gain <MagicalDivineDamageMod>[0]% _</>. When a divine attack is successful, reduce their <MoveSpeedMod>_ by [1]%</> for <Duration>[1] seconds</>. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

perks.name: Holy Aura
perks.description: Gain <ArmorRating>[0] _</> and <MagicResistance>[0] _</>. This effects both yourself and allies.

perks.name: Holy Water
perks.description: Drinking any drink removes all removable curses and harmful magic effects, and grants the Bless effect.

perks.name: Kindness
perks.description: Heal yourself for <Constant Type="Float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> of the spell's total heal amount when healing another target.

perks.name: Over Healing
perks.description: Even if the target's health is at full health, additional healing can be done by <Constant Type="Float" Format="AbsFromZero">[0]%</> of the target's maximum health. <OverhealedHealth>^</> degenerates at <Exec.AddHealthbyMaxHealthRatio>[0]%</> per second.

perks.name: Perseverance
perks.description: Reduces all types of incoming damage by <PhysicalAbsoluteReduction>[0]</>.

perks.name: Protection from Evil
perks.description: Reduce the duration of all harmful effects by <DebuffDurationMod>[0]%</>.

perks.name: Requiem
perks.description: Resurrecting an ally revives them with <Constant Type="Float" Format="AbsFromZero">[0]%</> HP instead of a sliver of life. When reviving an ally at the Altar of Sacrifice, you do not need to sacrifice any of your own health. Using the Resurrection spell also grants <SpellCastingSpeed>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Undead Slaying
perks.description: Gain <UndeadDamageMod>[0]% _</> against undead monsters.

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.description: Gain <PhysicalReduction>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Holy Purification
skills.description: After channeling for <Skill Type="CastingTime">[0] seconds</>, deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0] divine _</> to all undead monsters within a <Skill Type="Range">[0]m radius</> around you.

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description: After channeling for <Skill Type="CastingTime">[0] seconds</>, deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase>_</> to a target and reduce their <MoveSpeedMod>_ by [1]%</> for <Duration>[1] seconds</>. Once the channel begins on a target, crosshair targeting is no longer required. This spell has a <Skill Type="Range">[0]m range</> and will fail if the target goes out of range.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal an additional <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase>_</> to all enemies you hit within <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Only when melee attacking.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Bind
spells.description: Binds the target for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Grants the target <AllAttributes>[0] _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Cleanse
spells.description: Removes poison and curse effects from the target. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Divine Strike
spells.description: Grants the target <PhysicalDamageBase>[0] _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: Channel an earthquake in a <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m radius</> over <Spell Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>. Any target within the area is dealt <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalEarthDamageBase>_</> per step and receives <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</> reduction.

spells.name: Holy Light
spells.description: Heals a target for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0] _</> or deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase>_</> to an undead target.

spells.name: Holy Strike
spells.description: Deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase> _</> to all targets in an area, blinding them for <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

spells.name: Lesser Heal
spells.description: Heals the target for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0] _</>. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Locust Swarm
spells.description: Channel a swarm of locusts in a <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m radius</> over <Spell Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>. Any target within the area is dealt <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase>_</> per 1 second. The target also suffers reduced <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>_ by [1]%</> and <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>_ by [1]%</>.

spells.name: Protection
spells.description: Grants the target a shield that blocks <MaxPhysicalShield>[0]</> physical damage for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: Target an ally to resurrect them from the dead (the corpse must have a soul heart).

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: Channel for <Spell Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>, healing all targets within <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m</> for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0]</> per second and deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalDivineDamageBase>_</> per second to the undead.

classes.name: Druid
classes.flavor_text: The Druid is a spirit mage with a deep connection to nature. Able to wield the powers of the wilderness, they can even transform their bodies to mimic the powers of beasts.

perks.name: Animal Kinship
perks.description: Not all animals and insects attack first.

perks.name: Dreamwalk
perks.description: When you take damage, your <MagicalPower>_</> increases by <MagicalPower>[0]</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</> and you become spiritual. The player does not collide with other targets and cannot attack or use skills, but can cast spells. This ability triggers once every <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

perks.name: Enhanced Wildness
perks.description: While you are in animal form, you gain <PhysicalDamageMod>[0]% _</> and <ArmorRating>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Force of Nature
perks.description: When you heal a target, the target gains <PhysicalPower>[0] _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Herbal Sensing
perks.description: Detects nearby herbs and increases the chance of gathering higher-grade herbs.

perks.name: Lifebloom Aura
perks.description: Restores an additional <Constant Type="float" Format="Normal">[0]</> health to target when caster heals self or allies within aura range. Disables shapeshift.

perks.name: Natural Healing
perks.description: Recover yourself and nearby allies <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0] _</> every <YellowColor>3 seconds</>.

perks.name: Prophecy
perks.description: Targets near the aiming point are automatically selected, and single-target magic aimed at the selected target will not miss.

perks.name: Shapeshift Mastery
perks.description: Reduces shapeshifting time by <YellowColor>25%</> and reduces the cooldown of Wild skills by <GEMod Format="AbsFromOne" Type="Multiply">[0]%</>, but prevents the use of spirit spells.

perks.name: Spirit Bond
perks.description: Once every <Duration>[0] second</>, You will receive <Constant Type="Float" Format="FromZero">[0]%</> of damage received by party members instead. Can receive damage up to <Constant Type="Integer">[1]</>.

perks.name: Spirit Magic Mastery
perks.description: When you cast spirit magic, you gain <MagicalPower>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Sun and Moon
perks.description: Nearby allies gain <VigorBase>[0] _</> and <MagicalPower>[0] _</>.

perks.name: Thorn Coat
perks.description: When melee attacked, return <Exec.PhysicalDamageTrue>[0] _</> to the attacker.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory II
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Barkskin Armor
spells.description: Encloses the target in a protective bark for <Duration>[0] seconds</>, increasing <ArmorRating>_ by [0]</>, <HeadshotReductionMod>_ by [0]%</>.

spells.name: Dreamfire
spells.description: Deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalSpiritDamageBase>_</> to all enemies in an area. Instantly heals caster and allies currently affected by Nature’s Touch for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[1] _</> per target damaged. This effect applies within a <Spell Type="Range">[0] m radius</> of the caster.

spells.name: Entangling Vines
spells.description: Spreads roots across the floor in a <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m radius</> that last for <YellowColor>3 seconds</>. Any targets that pass through the area of ​​effect are frozen in place for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. After the effect removed, the target gets immunity to the entangling effects for <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

spells.name: Mending Grove
spells.description: While standing on the ground, create a forest area centered around you within a <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m radius</>. Targets in the area gain <MaxHealthMod>[1]% _</> and are healed for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0] _</> per second.

spells.name: Nature's Touch
spells.description: The target gains <Exec.AddRecoverableHealth>[0] _</>. Also healed <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[1] _</> over <Duration>[1] seconds</>. Casts instantly and casts on yourself if no target is found.

spells.name: Orb of Nature
spells.description: Fires an orb that deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalSpiritDamageBase>_</> on contact with an enemy, or grants Nature's Touch on contact with an ally.

spells.name: Restore
spells.description: Restore the health of all allies within <Spell Type="AreaRadius">[0]m radius</> by <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[0] _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Summon Treant
spells.description: Summons a treant to fight with you for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Treants become more powerful when summoned underwater.

spells.name: Thorn Barrier
spells.description: Creates a thorn barrier that lasts for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Any character standing near the thorn barrier will takes <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[1] _</> per second.

spells.name: Tree of Life
spells.description: Sprout a tree of life, granting <AllAttributes>[1] _</> and granting <Exec.AddRecoverableHealth>[0] _</> over <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Also heals for <Exec.MagicalHealBase>[2] _</> over <Duration>[2] seconds</>. Cannot cast on self.

shapeshifts.name: Bear
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild bear. Slow and too large to pass through single doors. Gain <PhysicalReductionMod>[0]% _</>, <ProjectileReductionMod> [0]% _</> and <MaxHealthMod>[0]% _</>. Lose <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</> and <ActionSpeed>[0]% _</>. Your jump lowered by <MovementMod Type="JumpZMultiply" Format="AbsFromOne">[0]%</>.

[Left-Click] Swipe
Claws the target with your right hand, inflicting <Strength>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [1]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [1]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</> and pushing the target away.

[Right-Click] Bash
Raise your body and deal <Strength>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [2]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [2]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</> with both hands, and gain the ability to push targets away and destroy unreinforced doors and containers.

[Wild] Wild Fury
For <Duration>[3] seconds</>, <PhysicalReduction>_</> increases by <PhysicalReduction>[3]%</> and <MagicalReduction>_</> increases by <MagicalReduction>[3]%</>.

shapeshifts.name: Chicken
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a chicken. Able to fly for a while by spreading wings. Lose <MaxHealthMod>[0]% _</>, <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</> and <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</>.

[Left-Click] Pecking
Pecks the target with its beak, inflicting <Resourcefulness>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [1]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [1]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</>. This attack penetrate <Exec.ArmorPenetration>[1]%</> of target’s armor.

[Right-Click] Clucking
The chicken clucks loudly.

[Wild] Insect Predation
Eats crawling insects and heals <Resourcefulness>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [2]%</> <Exec.PhysicalHealBase>_</>.

shapeshifts.name: Panther
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild panther. Very quick and agile. Gain <MoveSpeedAdd>[0] _</>. Lose <PhysicalReductionMod>[0]% _</>, <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</> and <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</>. Your jump is <MovementMod Type="JumpZMultiply" Format="AbsFromOne">[0]%</> higher.

[Left-Click] Scratch
Claws the target with his right hand, inflicting <Agility>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [1]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [1]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</> and causing the target to bleed, inflicting <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[2] _</> for <Duration>[2] seconds</>.

[Right-Click] Neckbite
Bite the target's neck, inflicting <Agility>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [3]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [3]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</>. While you are frenzied, Neckbite silences the target for <Duration>[4] seconds</>.

[Wild] Rush
Rush forward, entering a frenzied state for <Duration>[5] seconds</> after initiating the rush. You can use attacks while jumping, and this can be used in the air.

shapeshifts.name: Penguin
shapeshifts.description:
Transforms into a penguin. Slow on land, but very fast in water. Lose <MaxHealthMod>[4]% _</>, <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>[4]% _</> and <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>[4]% _</>.

[Left-Click] Sharp Beak
Bites the target with its beak, dealing <WillBase>_ curve</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcMultiply> * [2]%</><Exec.PrimitiveCalcAdd> + [2]</> <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>_</> and causing bleeding, inflicting <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[3] _</> over <Duration>[3] seconds</>

[Right-Click] Water Cannon
After casting, spit a stream of water forward, dealing <WillBase>_ curve</><YellowColor> * 100%</><Exec.MagicalDamageBase> + [0]</> <MagicalIceDamageBase>_</>.

[Wild] Penguin Dash
Gain <MoveSpeedMod>[1]% _</> while in water for <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

shapeshifts.name: Rat
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild rat. Small in size and moves quickly, but has very little stamina. Lose <MaxHealthMod>[0]% _</>, <PhysicalReduction>[0]% _</>, <MagicalReduction>[0]% _</>, <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</> and <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>[0]% _</>. Your jump is <MovementMod Type="JumpZMultiply" Format="AbsFromOne">[0]%</> higher.

[Left-Click] Infected Fangs
Bites the target, inflicting <Exec.PhysicalDamageBase>[1] _</> and spreading a plague that deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[2] _</> for <Duration>[2] seconds</>.

[Right-Click] Squeak

Gain <MaxHealthAdd>[3] _</>, <MoveSpeedAdd>[3] _</> for <Duration>[3] seconds</>. When the effect ends, lose <MoveSpeedMod>[4]% _</> for <Duration>[4] seconds</>.

classes.name: Fighter

classes.name: Ranger

Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional <MaxHealthAdd>[0] _</>, <ArmorRating>[0] _</>, and <MagicResistance>[0] _</>. Once activated, the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, by consuming Darkness Shards, you gain <AllAttributes>[1] _</>, <MagicalDarkDamageMod>[1]% _</> for each Darkness Shard consumed. When you become a demon your skills change to demon-only skills.

Left-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then performs bare-handed attack. Perform up to 4 combo attacks using both hands.

spells.description: Channel for <Spell Type="CastingTime">[0] seconds</> and summon an evil eye that can be possessed by the caster for <Spell Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Flame Walker
spells.description: While active, gain the ability to leave a trail of Hellfire for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Each step leaves a trail that lasts for <YellowColor>4 seconds</>. Targets that enter the flame area will <BurnEffect>burn</>, taking <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</> per <YellowColor>0.2 second</>.

spells.name: Hellfire
spells.description: Cast eternal hellfire and blast it towards the targets. Deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</> per second to any target within the area of effect. The hellfire does not dissipate when it reaches a target.

spells.name: Life Drain
spells.description: Channel for <Spell Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>, dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalEvilDamageBase>_</> to the target per second. Convert a portion of the damage dealt into health for the caster.

spells.name: Power of Sacrifice
spells.description: Deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalEvilDamageBase>_</> per second to the target while increasing their <StrengthBase>_ by [1]</> and <VigorBase>_ by [1]</> for <Duration>[2] seconds</>. Self casts if no target is found.

spells.name: Ray of Darkness
spells.description: Channel a dark beam dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalDarkDamageBase>_</> per second to any target the beam touches. Moving and aiming are possible while channeling.

spells.name: Spell Predation
spells.description:
Consume up to all removable magical buffs from the enemy and gain <YellowColor>1</> Darkness Shard per effect. Inflict <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1] evil _</> per effect.

Darkness Shard : Each Darkness Shard grants <AllAttributes>[0] _</>, <MagicalDarkDamageMod>[0]% _</> and can store up to <Constant Type="Integer" Format="Normal">[0]</>. This effect is consumed when casting a dark spell.

spells.name: Summon Hydra
spells.description: Summon a Hydra that spits fireballs dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</> to enemy targets for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. The hydra can also detect hidden targets.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.flavor_text: The Wizard calls forth the immense powers of magic to suit his needs. Whether that means summoning a powerful fireball to cast asunder his foes or to temporarily vanishing into thin air, his incantations are a sight to behold.

perks.name: Arcane Feedback
perks.description: When you deal damage with an arcane spell, gain a stacking bonus granting <SpellCastingSpeed>[0]% _</> and <MagicalArcaneDamageMod>[0]% _</> per stack for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. This skill can stack up to <YellowColor>5</> times and the duration resets with each successful stack.

perks.name: Arcane Mastery
perks.description: Gain <MagicalArcaneDamageMod>[0]% _</> and reduce the cast time of arcane spells by <Constant Type="Float">[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Fire Mastery
perks.description: Gain <MagicalFireDamageMod>[0]% _</>. The duration of applied <BurnEffect>burns</> are increased by <YellowColor>2 seconds</>, and a burned target reduces <PhysicalHealingReceiveMod>_ by [1]%</> and <MagicalHealingReceiveMod>_ by [1]%</> for <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

perks.name: Ice Mastery
perks.description: Dealing damage with ice magic freezes the target's feet and prevents them from moving for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Ice Shield
perks.description:
Gain <ArmorRating>[1] _</>. Inflict <FrostbiteEffect>frostbite</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</> on melee attacker. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

<FrostbiteEffect>Frostbite</>: The target loses <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</> and <ActionSpeed>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Mana Surge
perks.description: Gain <MagicalDamageMod>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Melt
perks.description: When you deal magical fire damage to a target, the target loses <PhysicalReduction>[0]% _</> and <ProjectileReductionMod>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

perks.name: Quick Chant
perks.description: Gain <SpellCastingSpeed>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Reactive Shield
perks.description: When you take damage, gain an arcane shield that lasts for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. The shield can absorb <MaxTotalShield>[0]</> total damage and will only reactivate after a cooldown period.

perks.name: Sage
perks.description: Gain <knowledgeMod>[0]% _</>.

perks.name: Spell Overload
perks.description: Reduces <KnowledgeMod>_ by [0]%</> and increases all spells counts by <MaxSpellCountMod>[0]%</>.

perks.name: Staff Mastery
perks.description: When using a staff-type weapon, you gain <MagicalDamageWeaponPrimary>[0] _</>.

skills.name: Arcane Shield
skills.description: Gain a shield around you that absorbs <MaxTotalShield>[0]</> damage from all damage sources for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. When the maximum amount of absorb has been reached, the shield unleashes an Arcane Explosion, dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1] _</> to enemy targets in a <Skill Type="Range">[0]m radius</> around you.

skills.name: Intense Focus
skills.description: Reduce the cast time of your next spell to <Constant Type="Float">[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Enter a meditative state and recover spells at a rate of <Constant Type="Integer">[0]</> spells costs over <Skill Type="ChannelingDuration">[0] seconds</>.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description:
<ElectrifiedEffect>Electrocute</> the target for <Duration>[1] seconds</>, dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalLightningDamageBase>_</>, and fires lightning that is transferred to targets within a <Spell Type="Range">[0]m</> area up to <YellowColor>3</> times. It does not transfer to a target it was transferred to previously, and it transfers to the caster if you are nearby.

<ElectrifiedEffect>Electrified</> : The target loses <MoveSpeedMod>[1]% _</>.

spells.name: Explosion
spells.description:
When cast, an explosion occurs in the targeted area after <YellowColor>3 seconds</>, dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</> and inflicting <BurnEffect>burn</> over <Duration>[1] seconds</> within a 1m area.

<BurnEffect>Burn</>: The target takes <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</>.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description:
Shoot a burning fireball, dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>direct _</> to a target and <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>splash _</>, knocking back nearby targets and inflicting <BurnEffect>burn</> over <Duration>[2] seconds</>.

<BurnEffect>Burn</>: The target takes <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[2]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</>.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Grants the target <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</>, <ActionSpeed>[0]% _</>, <SpellCastingSpeed>[0]% _</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Ice Bolt
spells.description:
Deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalIceDamageBase>_</> to the target, inflicting <FrostbiteEffect>frostbite</> for <Duration>[1] seconds</>.

<FrostbiteEffect>Frostbite</>: The target loses <MoveSpeedMod>[1]% _</> and <ActionSpeed>[1]% _</>.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.description:
Set the target's weapon on fire for <Duration>[2] seconds</>. While active, deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</> and inflict <BurnEffect>burn</> over <Duration>[1] seconds</> on successful attacks.

<BurnEffect>Burn</>: The target takes <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</>.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: Grants the target invisibility for <Duration>[0] seconds</>. While active, the target also gains <MoveSpeedMod>[0]% _</>. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Slows the target's <MoveSpeedMod>_ by [0]%</> for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Light Orb
spells.description: Cast spheres of floating light to brightly illuminate your surroundings. Can force rogues out of hiding.

spells.name: Lightning Strike
spells.description:
When cast, a bolt of lightning strikes the targeted area, <ElectrifiedEffect>Electrocuting</> enemies for <Duration>[1] seconds</> and dealing <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalLightningDamageBase>_</>.

<ElectrifiedEffect>Electrified</> : The target loses <MoveSpeedMod>[1]% _</>.

spells.name: Magic Lock
spells.description: Lockable objects such as doors or boxes will be locked for <Duration>[0] seconds</>.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Fire up to <YellowColor>10</> homing missile that each deal <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalArcaneDamageBase>_</>. Stops firing when you move.

spells.name: Zap
spells.description:
Deals <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[0]</> <MagicalLightDamageBase>_</> and <BurnEffect>burns</> the target over <Duration>[1] second</>.

<BurnEffect>Burn</>: The target takes <Exec.MagicalDamageBase>[1]</> <MagicalFireDamageBase>_</>.
